system_overview.name: Norwegian Customs Tariff
system_overview.description: Interactive database for commodity classification and tariff information

primary_tool.name: The Customs Tariff (Interactive Database)
primary_tool.description: Main tool for finding Norwegian tariff codes and rates

tariff_code_specifications.nomenclature: Norwegian Customs Tariff (based on HS nomenclature)
tariff_code_specifications.classification_system: Based on Harmonized System with Norwegian extensions

guidance_documents.description: Information on obtaining binding rulings for specific goods
How to find correct commodity codes for imports/exports
Explanation of terminology used in the tariff

bulk_download_capability.notes: System appears to be interactive lookup-based
potential_access: Direct query of the database interface
Contact Tolletaten directly for bulk data extraction
Potentially available through Norwegian government data portals

data_specifications.product_scope: All goods subject to import into Norway

assessment.importance: MEDIUM - Norway is a developed market with significant trade
assessment.accessibility: Public interface available; bulk download not documented
assessment.recommendation: Secondary priority - Contact Tolletaten directly for bulk tariff data; interactive interface available for spot checks
